titleStmt.title: SII 35.61: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 61. (A.R. No. 15 of 1950-51.) GŌLIHAḶḶI, KHANAPUR TALUK, BELGAUM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up near Siddhaliṅga temple.

This damaged record refers to the reign of Bhulōkamalla Sōmēśvara IV and states that Permāḍidēva, the Kadaṁba chief of Goa and his mother Maiḷaladēvī were ruling from their capital at Gōve. The record is dated the Kaliyuga year 4283, Manmatha, Phālguṇa śu 13, Thursday. The details of date are very irregular. The given tithi in the Kaliyuga year 4283, corresponded to 1183 A.D., February 7, Monday, when the cyclic year was Śubhakṛit. If we consider the cyclic year, the details would correspond to 1176 A.D., February 24, Tuesday. It is difficult to identify Bhulōkamalla of this record.

The earlier portion of the record which gives a genealogical account of the Kadaṁbas of Goa refers also to Vijayāditya, the younger brother of Permāḍi, as ruling along with his brother. It further discloses the fact that Maiḷalamahādēvī was the daughter of Malayamatīdēvī and Vikramāditya VI.

It registers gifts of land, house-site and oilmill by Malliseṭṭi, Dēviseṭṭi and Madhuraseṭṭi sons of Gangiseṭṭi to the basadi got built by the latter at Kiru Saṁpagāḍi. It also registers gifts of income from taxes etc. by the Five hundred. These gifts were made over to Vāsūpūjya-bhaṭṭāraka, of Mulasaṁgha and Baḷagāragaṇa, disciple of Nēmichandra-bhaṭṭāraka whose lineage is described. The gifts were made on the occasion of a lunar eclipse. The record refers to a mahāpradhāna, haḍapavaḷa etc., of the Kadaṁba chiefs. But his name is lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ jīyātraiḷōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ .
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷa
tiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmadubhūlōkamalladēvaravijayarājyamuttarōttarābhi vṛddhi prava[¨rddha]
mānamācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . śrīmaccaḻukyavaṁsasikhāmaṇi bhūlōkamallanī dhareyaṁ
diksāmajame sīmeyāgemahanmahimaṁ pāḷisuttamirepalakāla . tatpādapadumōpajīvi jēṣṭa kadaṁ
bānvayadoḷu . laṁkege kappamaṁ munidu bēḍi bahitramanēṟi nūṁkidaṁ koṁkaṇacakrava¨rtthi vibhu caṭṭaya pe
naluke vikramāḷaṁkaraṇaṁge laṁkeya vibhīsaṇanaṭṭidaneyde kappamaṁ saṁkeyineṁdaḍā mōnnati
yaṁ pogaḷaluke ballarār . tatsuta . jayalakṣmīvallabhaṁ kṣatriyakuḷadīpakaṁ śau¨ryya gāṁbhī¨ryyadhai¨ryyani
śrīyanīśa śrīpadāṁbōruhamadhurarasāsvādabhriṁgaṁ kadaṁbānvaya rājyaśrī manō nanu
pamasau¨ryyasaṁpaṁnnarūpaṁ jayakēsi śrīmahīpāḷakanenenegaḷdaṁ vīralakṣmīviḷāsaṁ . tattanūbhava . tanuvaṁ
vaṁdya catige dhanamaṁ brajāka¨rṇnaneṁba nīnugrāṁtakaneṁbaniṁ paḍeduda tāṁ gaṁḍarādityana naṁtacittame pōluvanaṁtavīra
nītaṁ kī¨rtthimā¨rtthaṁḍaneṁdana vāṁtiṟiveḷeyiṁ vijayādityāvanīpāḷakaṁ . tadapatyaṁ jayakēsidēvanesedi¨rddaṁ tyāgasiṁghāsa
nāmuditaṁ śrīramaṇaṁ caḷukyanripajātanūtakāṁtasukhā vairibaḷavanmātaṁga kuṁbhasthaḷabidurōdphanavrā
nāgarājanū¨rjjitayasa lōkaikaḷpadruma . * . samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēsvara banavāsipuravarādhīsvaraṁ
samastabhuva stūyamānyaharadharaṇīsutaṁ triḷōcanakadaṁbānvayamā ma hōdaya mahīdharēṁdrasukharābhyudaya
mānapracaṁṇḍamā¨rtaṇḍakarāḷātitībranijapratāpavasīkritasakaḷamahīmaṇḍa ḷaṁ pe¨rmmaṭṭi tū¨ryyani¨rgghōsaṇa caturāsīti
nagarādhiṣṭhitāmaṣṭādasayajñadīkṣādīkṣitakuḷaprasūtanu tyāgajhagajaṁpajhaṁpaḷā cā¨ryya subhaṭakanakanikaṣō
paḷa saraṇāgatavajraprākāra nāmādi sakaḷā kāsa tarappa śrīmajjayakēsidēvaṁ sukhavi¨rppaṁdu Ā vibhu
vinasati dēvigamatyadhikaṁ negaḻdaruṁdhatige migilu sāvitrige maiḷaladēviyenenalu mikkadiṁ
janakaṁ caḷukya pe¨rmmāḍinripāḷaṁ malayamatimahādēvi jagajjananute petta tāyi tanagene maiḷaladēviyantunōnturu
mōḷarē . kuḷavadhuve nalumeyiṁ maiḷaladēvige tatupriyanī jayakēśimahītaḷapatige puṭṭida¨rbhbhūtaḷanāta¨rvīra
pe¨rmmāḍi vijayādityaru . Intiva¨rssukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyyuttamiralu nāgarasaṁ paguḍiyataḷa muṁtā
yagaḷu Aṟuvatokkalu Eṁṭuhiṭṭu kāraṇaṁgaḷu mukhyavāgiyavaranumatadi kiṟusaṁpagāḍiyalu Aṁ
gaḍiya malliśeṭṭiyaru go[¨rkkā]maseṭṭiyaru gaṁgiseṭṭiyaru māḍisida basadi . Avara tadanvayada kramada guruga
ḷu . śrī jinasāntika modalādī mūḷasaṁghaṁ niraṁtaramā saṁtati naṁdisaṁgha ttire saṁ
da¨rvvaṟi¨rggāṟa mukhyagaṇadoḷu gaṁgānvayakkī tiḷāggamagaḷuṟamene va¨rddhamānamuni mukhya¨rddhāriṇīcakradoḷu . © .
Avara śiṣya¨rvvidyānaṁdasvāmigaḷu [Aṣṭōpavā]sidēvaruṁ pa¨rvvōpavāsidēvaruṁ guṇacaṁdrabhaṭṭārakaruṁ kukkuṭāṁgagaḷaivaruṁ .
baḷagāṟagaṇasarōvaranaḷināṁka¨rgguptasamitīsayamayuktarakhiḷa gaḷenalaggaḷame śrīdha ra mū
nīṁdrarapagatataṁtraru . Atisayacaṁdrakī¨rtti munirājatōpavanarāja guṇamēghacaṁdra munivākya ya
sthamarājahaṁsanū guṇamatsaraṁ sukavivatsanujvaḷakī¨rtti bhāratīpatiyene ṁ paramatinavaṁ śrutakī¨rtthidēvan
Avara śiṣya nēmicaṁdrabhaṭṭārakadēvaru . śrīdharabudhanamarēṁdramahīdharadhai¨ryya vinaya hridaya dhaka
raṁ sukhamayanidhisādhakanātaḷave nēmicaṁdramunīṁdra . Avara saha ḷu vāsupūjya traividyadēvaru
nnatabhūpāḷatikirīṭakōṭikiraṇavyālīḍhapādāṁbujadvitayaṁ paṁḍitamaṁḍaḷa prakaṭitāsāva¨rtti kī¨rtyaṁganāpati hrijjāta
kujātakhaṁḍanakuṭāravāgvadhu bhaya ti graṇi vāsupūjyanesedaṁ rāddhāṁta ca krēsvaraṁ . Avara sahadha¨rmmi
gaḷu maleyāḷapaṁḍitadēvaru . maṭṭaviru vādi haribaḷa niṁnaṭṭe yaliṭṭa ṭṭaḷipavādinivahagharaṭṭaṁ
śrīkumudacaṁdrapaṁḍitadēvaṁ . Avara śiṣyaru vāsupūjyabhaṭṭārakadēvaru . Uditaśrīvara mūḷasaṁghade baḷa
tkārōnnatōdyaduguṇāsvādadiṁ sannucārusaccharitadi prakhyātivetti¨rddu sanumudadiṁ śrī jinadha¨rmmamaṁ pasarisu
tattatapaśriyavoppidanī dhātrige vāsupūjyamunipaṁ madhyānakaḷpadrumaṁ . Avara śiṣyaru . sruta vi
dyānidhiyatipatinuta padmaprabhamunīsarāddhāṁta saṁvitatayasanudeyacaṁdrabratiyesa vaṁ saccharitra
guṇaniḷeyaruṁ . Avara śiṣyaru prabhuguṇagaṇasaṁbhūtinubhayanayāgamavicāra sāhityakaḷāvibhavā
ḷaṁkritanesavaṁ tribhuvanadēvaṁ manōjavigrahaśīḷaṁ . Avara guḍḍaru . balavaṁta¨rvvinayānvi ta¨rgguṇagaṇāḷaṁkāra
ja sudhākara¨rssakaḷasāhityākara¨rssatukaḷākaḷitācāravicāracārucarita¨rssaddha¨rmmanisādhaka[¨rkku]lavaṁta¨rmma paṭṭi
ppainū¨rvvaraṁ pōlvarāru . mattamavaroḷagrajaputraṁ . Enitaṁ pe¨rmmegēneṁnaḍa parikisaluvaḷunyaraṁ seṭṭimaṁḍana
cūḍāmaṇi gaṁgiseṭṭiyidoḷeṁ saujaṁnyare puṇyabhājanar cārucaritrasaṁpa dapaduprāgalbhyare kīttīva¨rddhanare sadguṇavaṁtare
saṁhitabyāpārasaṁpaṁnnare . tatsati . pati negaḻda sati seṭṭiya sati sajjanasūre satyasaṁpada sītāpatidānamānaguṇa
yute negaḻdaḷu nāgiyakkanavanītaḷadoḷu . śrīmatu maiḷalamahādēviyaru . śrīvīra pe¨rmmāḍidēvaru gōveya
nelavīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyyuttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi . śrīmanmahāpradhanaṁ haḍapavaḷaṁ sēnādi mahāpracaṁḍadaṁḍanāya
yyaṁgaḷuṁ śrīmatu maiyiḷā dēviyaru śrīma kiṟusaṁpagāḍiyalu gaṁgiseṭṭiyara
māḍisida basadige kaliyuga 4283 neya manmathasaṁvatsarada phālguṇa su 13 brahaspativāradandu Avara magaṁ ma
lliseṭṭidēviseṭṭimadhuraseṭṭiyarusōmagrahaṇanimittavāgiśrīnēmicaṁdrabhaṭṭārakadēvara śiṣyaru śrī vāsupūjyabha
ṭṭārakadēvara pādaprakṣālanaṁ māḍi dēvara Aṣṭavidhā¨rcanakaṁ riśiyara Āhāradānakkaṁ jī¨rṇnōddhārakaṁ basa
dige koṭṭa keyya sīmāsaṁmmaṁdhaveṁtene paḍuvalu hobbaraṇeyiṁ baḍagalu hāṇadiyiṁ
mūḍalu karabhūmiya huṇiseya maradiṁ dāḍakaṇiya teṁkalu mattamā basadige dēvara naṁdādīvigege biṭṭa gāṇamene
ri mūla paḍuvalu 21 keyya nivēśaṇa mattaṁ Aynū¨rvvaru biṭṭa dha¨rmameṁtene Āne māṇika paḷi paṭhṭhāvaḷi Aḍake meḷa
sudhāṁnyavasavēnādoḍaṁ Ā sthaḷadalu vikrayavādoḍa hoṁge kāṇi . mattayinū¨rvvaru basadige biṭṭa dha¨rmmameṁteṁdoḍe
sthānika katavenāḍoḍa Ayvatu Āge māṇikayaṁ hēridoḍe sa¨rvvabādhe parihāra . Īntī dha¨rmmamaṁnāvanādo
ḍaṁ pratipāḷipaṁge gaṁge vāraṇāsiyalu śehaśrakavileyaṁ dānaṁ geyda phalamaneyduvaru . mudadiṁdī (di) dha¨rmmamaṁ kādava¨rgge
siddhi lakṣmīvaṁśābhyudeyaṁ dī¨rghāyu yadaḷida kaṣṭāge duṣṭāge saṁtānaveredu Āyyukyayaṁ śrī Aḷiva
pātakaṁgakkumaṁtapparu taṁtāniradaḷdu narakadoḷa muḍimuḷkāḍutti¨rkkuṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā
rēti vasundharā śaṣṭiva¨rṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jayatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 35.61 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
